items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips As Trump Says This On Iran; Warren Buffett Stock Flashes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index fell and other indexes were mixed after President Trump spoke on Iran. A Warren Buffett stock dived but Palantir popped. Oil and defense stocks rose.

items.title: Lightning Round: Goldman Sachs is way too cheap, says Jim Cramer
items.description: 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer weighs in on viewer stocks.

items.title: Goldman Says European Gas Could Surge 130% to $25 on Hormuz Halt
items.description: Bank warns one-month Strait of Hormuz disruption could more than double European and Asian LNG prices.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Up After U.S.-Iran Attacks; LNG Stock Clears Entry As Oil Prices Pop (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was off opening lows on the stock market today after U.S.-Iran attacks. Tesla fell but oil and defense stocks rose.

items.title: UBS Underperforming Global Banks As Legal Liabilities Mount; Still Trades At Premium To Rivals
items.description: UBS Group faces lawsuits and regulatory uncertainty. The company says they're alright. Market has other ideas.
